# SecPublicKeyHash

**Type Alias**

A container for a 20-byte public key hash.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias SecPublicKeyHash = (UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8)
```

## Discussion

The `SecPublicKeyHash` type represents a hash of a public key. You can use the constant `kSecPublicKeyHashItemAttr` as input to functions in the Keychain Services API to set or retrieve a certificate attribute value of this type. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/keychain-services] for information about getting and setting attribute values.
title: SecPublicKeyHash
